test.summary: 84 tests passed across 6 test files (curve, observability, config, quote, server.quote-compare, server.integration)

lint.summary: 2 warnings (complexity in compareQuotes and handleRequest), 0 errors — these are pre-existing and non-blocking

appliedUpdates.description: Documented token input display format ('SYMBOL (0xABCD...1234)') with data-address attribute and extractAddressFromInput() behavior. Also documented the asymmetric gas_used data model: Spandex always provides gas_used (defaults to '0'), Curve only provides it when a sender is given and estimation succeeds.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the skill description from 'Implements server-side endpoints and inline HTML/JS UI features for the CowSwap Trader app' to 'Implements server-side endpoints and inline HTML/JS UI features for the Compare DEX Routers app'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The brutalist-layout-redesign reviewer found that the fullstack-worker skill description still references 'CowSwap Trader'. The project was rebranded to 'Compare DEX Routers' via the fix-rebrand-to-compare-dex-routers feature. AGENTS.md mandates that all CowSwap Trader references be replaced.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly interpreted 'any other *.png files' to remove 19 files rather than the 7 listed explicitly in the feature description.
rejectedObservations.reason: no-action-needed — the worker behaved correctly and no convention gap exists; the feature description was clear.

rejectedObservations.observation: Convention observation about design guidelines thoroughness in mission AGENTS.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — the design guidelines are in the mission AGENTS.md and were followed correctly; no gap to fill.

nonBlockingIssues.description: extractAddressFromInput fallback: when data-address is empty and display string 'SYMBOL (0x1234...5678)' is present, the function returns a truncated non-address string. Harmless because selectToken always sets data-address and the server validates addresses, but the edge case is worth awareness.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Optionally add a validation check in extractAddressFromInput to return empty string if neither data-address nor valid address pattern found, rather than returning the truncated display string.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Pre-existing innerHTML XSS surface: renderSecondaryDetails and quote renderers use innerHTML with API response data (router_calldata, router_address). Not a regression from this feature — same pattern used before the redesign.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Future hardening: sanitize API response strings before innerHTML insertion, or use textContent/createTextNode for data fields.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Details toggle button uses inline onclick handler instead of addEventListener, inconsistent with codebase pattern.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Minor: convert to addEventListener on DOMContentLoaded binding for consistency.
